title: eragrostiella brachyphylla
intro: Eragrostiella brachyphylla, also known as the African feather grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eragrostiella brachyphylla include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
